artifact_refs.description: Evidence-only notebook used to inspect the Optiver data and freeze a plain-language shortlist before bank alignment.
Authoritative shortlist-to-bank mapping for the Optiver human baseline.
Author notes for the Optiver human baseline.
Links each selected bank action to notebook evidence or worksheet sections.
Run-level provenance for the Optiver human baseline.

notes: Manual Optiver TC1 baseline. The final selection keeps the simple auction defaults, first-order microstructure features, one lag family, one stock-prior strategy, and clock features while leaving memory downcasting out of the baseline.
